column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit vigorously shaking pom-poms" | TEXT="ファイト！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit blowing a whistle" | TEXT="気合入れろ！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit high jump with pom-poms" | TEXT="いけるいける！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit holding giant flag" | TEXT="大逆転！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing cheerleader split" | TEXT="ナイス！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit banging a drum" | TEXT="ドンドコ！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit yelling into megaphone" | TEXT="聞こえますか！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit with victory pose" | TEXT="最高！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing energetic cheer dance" | TEXT="わっしょい！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit performing a backflip cheer" | TEXT="アクロバティック！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit waving a handkerchief" | TEXT="フレーフレー！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a group wave alone" | TEXT="一人で盛り上がる" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit blowing a trumpet" | TEXT="ファンファーレ！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit throwing cheering confetti" | TEXT="おめでとう！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a heroic landing" | TEXT="準備はいいか！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit holding a supportive banner" | TEXT="全力で推します" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a synchronized clap" | TEXT="パンパン！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a celebratory slide" | TEXT="やったぜ！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit cheering with a glowing stick" | TEXT="輝いてるよ！" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a silent cheer with focus" | TEXT="祈ってるからね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit running along to support" | TEXT="どこまでもついていく" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a belly dance of joy" | TEXT="お祝いだ！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit boxing the air to cheer" | TEXT="自分に負けるな！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a funny victory dance" | TEXT="ウキウキ！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit forming a heart with arms" | TEXT="大好きだよ！" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit giving a huge thumbs up" | TEXT="完璧！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit shedding tears of joy" | TEXT="感動しました！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit shouting while holding a fan" | TEXT="推しが尊い" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a high-five in mirror" | TEXT="自画自賛" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit holding a sign with your name" | TEXT="君が一番！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit wearing a headband with "FIGHT"" | TEXT="不屈の精神" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a victory lap" | TEXT="止まらない喜び" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit pumping fists in the air" | TEXT="よっしゃー！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit throwing a wreath" | TEXT="栄光を君に" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a standing ovation" | TEXT="ブラボー！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit flashing a victory sign" | TEXT="勝訴！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit cheering while floating on balloons" | TEXT="舞い上がる気分" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a sumo victory stomp" | TEXT="どすこい！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit wearing a mascot costume half-way" | TEXT="中身も応援" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a breakdance move" | TEXT="キレキレ応援" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit blowing a party horn" | TEXT="パーッといこう！" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit acting like a superstar" | TEXT="君もスターだ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a bow of respect" | TEXT="頭が下がります" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit holding out a gold medal" | TEXT="君に授与します" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit dancing with a colorful umbrella" | TEXT="華やかにいこう！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit cheering with a microphone" | TEXT="実況室からお届け" P2: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a wave of fire" | TEXT="激熱！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit creating a human pyramid alone" | TEXT="団結力（独り）" P4: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a salute with pride" | TEXT="了解しました！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit waving with a gentle face" | TEXT="いつも見守ってるよ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a sprint to the finish" | TEXT="最後まで駆け抜けろ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit cheering while holding a teacup" | TEXT="落ち着きつつ応援" P8: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit making a peace sign in both hands" | TEXT="ハッピーピース" P9: ACTION/PROPS="man in suit doing a jumping kick of victory" | TEXT="限界突破！"
